name: python3-pyqt6.qtpositioning
title: python3-pyqt6.qtpositioning
summary: Python bindings for Qt 6 Positioning module
description:
Python bindings for Qt 6 Positioning module
Qt Positioning API provides positioning information.
.
This package contains the QtPositioning module of PyQt6.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pyqt6.qtpositioning because Python bindings for Qt 6 Positioning module.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pyqt6.qtpositioning as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pyqt6.qtpositioning with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pyqt6.qtpositioning --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
